pokemon:bayleef.name: Bayleef
pokemon:bayleef.summary: Bayleef’s neck is ringed by curled-up leaves. Inside each tubular leaf is a small shoot of a tree. The fragrance of this shoot makes people peppy.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Bayleef’s neck is ringed by curled-up leaves. Inside each tubular leaf is a small shoot of a tree. The fragrance of this shoot makes people peppy.
The buds that ring its neck give off a spicy aroma that perks people up.
The buds that ring its neck give off a spicy aroma that perks people up.
The scent that wafts from the leaves on its neck causes anyone who smells it to become energetic.
The buds that ring its neck give off a spicy aroma that perks people up.
A BAYLEEF’s neck is ringed by curled-up leaves. Inside each leaf is a small tree shoot. The fragrance of this shoot makes people peppy.
A spicy aroma emanates from around its neck. The aroma acts as a stimulant to restore health.
The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.
The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.

pokemon:chikorita.name: Chikorita
pokemon:chikorita.summary: In battle, Chikorita waves its leaf around to keep the foe at bay. However, a sweet fragrance also wafts from the leaf, becalming the battling Pokémon and creating a cozy, friendly atmosphere all around.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: In battle, Chikorita waves its leaf around to keep the foe at bay. However, a sweet fragrance also wafts from the leaf, becalming the battling Pokémon and creating a cozy, friendly atmosphere all around.
It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe.
It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe.
It loves to bask in the sunlight. It uses the leaf on its head to seek out warm places.
It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe.
It waves its leaf around to keep foes at bay. However, a sweet fragrance also wafts from the leaf, creating a friendly atmosphere that becalms the battlers.
Its pleasantly aromatic leaves have the ability to check the humidity and temperature.
A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.
A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up sunrays.
A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun’s rays.

pokemon:meganium.name: Meganium
pokemon:meganium.summary: The fragrance of Meganium’s flower soothes and calms emotions. In battle, this Pokémon gives off more of its becalming scent to blunt the foe’s fighting spirit.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The fragrance of Meganium’s flower soothes and calms emotions. In battle, this Pokémon gives off more of its becalming scent to blunt the foe’s fighting spirit.
Its breath has the fantastic ability to revive dead plants and flowers.
Its breath has the fantastic ability to revive dead plants and flowers.
Anyone who stands beside it becomes refreshed, just as if they were relaxing in a sunny forest.
Its breath has the fantastic ability to revive dead plants and flowers.
The fragrance of a MEGANIUM’s flower soothes and calms emotions. In battle, it gives off more of its becalming scent to blunt the foe’s fighting spirit.
MEGANIUM’s breath has the power to revive dead grass and plants. It can make them healthy again.
The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
